TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u pildac nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pildac kuni idawtu Ku sakidaya.u tatiedan nu pinacadan kya pildac.anu inayi'kidapildac caay kya paudipay Ku pinacadan nusakidaya,u Laylau nu sakidaya caay pakaliyas tu pildac maudip.antacuwacuwa ku pinacadan nu sakidaya sa million tu tu pildac palawyna tu tinapildac,
S.PHON: u pir~…æda ¶ nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pir~…æda ¶ kuni idawtu ku sakidaja.u tati…ôdan nu pina ¶adan kja pir~…æda ¶.anu inaji î~ °kidapir~…æda ¶ ¶aaj kja paudipaj ku pina ¶adan nusakidaja,u r~…æajr~…æau nu sakidaja ¶aaj pakar~…æijas tu pir~…æda ¶ maudip.anta ¶uwa ¶uwa ku pina ¶adan nu sakidaja sa mir~…ær~…æion tu tu pir~…æda ¶ par~…æawjna tu tinapir~…æda ¶,
S.FORM: u pildac nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pildac kuni idawtu Ku sakidaya.u tatiedan nu pinacadan kya pildac.anu inayi'kidapildac caay kya paudipay Ku pinacadan nusakidaya,u Laylau nu sakidaya caay pakaliyas tu pildac maudip.antacuwacuwa ku pinacadan nu sakidaya sa million tu tu pildac palawyna tu tinapildac,
S.PHON: u pir~…æda ¶ nanu kasumamadan tuidaw nikaidawan nu pir~…æda ¶ kuni idawtu ku sakidaja.u tati…ôdan nu pina ¶adan kja pir~…æda ¶.anu inaji î~ °kidapir~…æda ¶ ¶aaj kja paudipaj ku pina ¶adan nusakidaja,u r~…æajr~…æau nu sakidaja ¶aaj pakar~…æijas tu pir~…æda ¶ maudip.anta ¶uwa ¶uwa ku pina ¶adan nu sakidaja sa mir~…ær~…æion tu tu pir~…æda ¶ par~…æawjna tu tinapir~…æda ¶,
